project_type: Expo React Native mobile app (LLM chat client)
build_system: Expo with npm, no native build in sandbox
test_framework: Playwright e2e flows + fake OpenCode server; no unit tests
test_command: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
verification_instructions: Run npm run lint && npm run typecheck to confirm no regressions. The e2e tests require a running server and web build so typecheck is the primary gate in sandbox.
environment_constraints: No native build tools (Android/Xcode). Validation is lint + typecheck only. No Docker daemon.
contribution_requirements: Follow AGENTS.md layer rules: providers own domain state, components own presentation, lib owns protocol/storage. Keep screens thin. Run lint + typecheck as baseline validation.
key_patterns: BellowsChatProvider pattern: createContext + Provider component + useBellowsChat hook. AsyncStorage for persistence. react-native-paper for UI (IconButton, Surface, Text, Menu, TextInput, Modal). Colors from constants/theme.ts. BELLOWS_CHAT_MESSAGES_STORAGE_KEY in lib/storage-keys.ts. bellowsChatCompletion returns usage field.
directory_structure: app/(tabs)/ = route screens, providers/ = domain state, components/chat/ = chat UI, lib/ = protocol/storage/helpers, constants/ = theme
